# CWE-708: Incorrect Ownership Assignment (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-708-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"os"
	"strconv"
)

// Vulnerable: uploaded file ownership is assigned to a client-provided uid.
// No validation ties the target path to an application-controlled directory.
func FinishUpload(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	dest := r.FormValue("dest")
	owner := r.FormValue("owner_uid")
	uid, _ := strconv.Atoi(owner)
	if err := os.Chown(dest, uid, uid); err != nil {
		http.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusInternalServerError)
		return
	}
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
}
